brightest_bulb_label: Using the shown resistance labels, which bulb has the greatest brightness?
Which bulb dissipates the most power in this circuit?
Which labeled bulb would glow brightest in the ideal circuit?
Select the label of the brightest bulb.
dimmest_bulb_label: Using the shown resistance labels, which bulb has the least brightness?
Which bulb dissipates the least power in this circuit?
Which labeled bulb would glow dimmest in the ideal circuit?
Select the label of the dimmest bulb.

scene:bulb_circuit_diagram.object_description: an ideal-battery circuit with five labeled bulbs and resistance labels

query:brightest_bulb_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel bounding box around the selected bulb symbol and its resistance label
query:brightest_bulb_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the brightest bulb as a string, for example "B2"

query:dimmest_bulb_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel bounding box around the selected bulb symbol and its resistance label
query:dimmest_bulb_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the dimmest bulb as a string, for example "B2"
